package rulecoverage

func NegativeSensitiveDataInLog() string {
    ruleID := "sensitive_data_in_log"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`log.Printf`, `slog.Info`, `zap.String`, `logrus.WithField` calls that include variables named `password`, `secret`, `token`, `apiKey`, `creditCard`, `ssn`, or similar"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
